input.final_summary: All shell commands (including `rtk git log`, `rtk git log -p`, `rtk git blame`, and `rtk read`) were rejected by the `customer-api-release-policy.ps1` pre-tool hook with no output, so this subagent could not read git history or current file contents. content.text:
## Investigation blocked — cannot deliver git findings

Every **Shell** invocation failed before execution:

- Hook: `.cursor\hooks\customer-api-release-policy.ps1`
- Behavior: fail closed, **no hook output**
- Affected: all requested commands and even `rtk read` on the same paths

This subagent only has **Shell** and **UpdateCurrentStep** (no **Read**, no **codebase-memory MCP**), so no git history or file content could be loaded here.

### Commands not executed (run from parent or local terminal)

`RTK ▸ rtk git log --oneline -20 -- Admin/UI/Components/Pages/FormTemplate/PermitForms/`

`RTK ▸ rtk git log -p -5 -- Admin/UI/Components/Pages/FormTemplate/PermitForms/PermitForms.razor`

`RTK ▸ rtk git blame -L 40,55 -- Admin/UI/Components/Pages/FormTemplate/PermitForms/PermitForms.razor`

Optional comparison (after fixing hook or in external terminal):

`RTK ▸ rtk grep -l "ShowEditFormDialogAsync" Admin/UI/Components/Pages/FormTemplate/`

`RTK ▸ rtk grep -l "FormSelectionEditDialog" Admin/UI/Components/Pages/FormTemplate/`

### How to answer your four items once git works

| # | What to do |
|---|------------|
| **1. Commits** | In `git log -p -5`, find hunks that change the toolbar **جدید** `OnClick` or the method it calls (`ShowCreateDialogAsync` / `ShowEditFormDialogAsync` / `FormSelectionEditDialog`). Note commit hash + subject. |
| **2. OLD** | From the parent commit of the regression: copy the **MudButton** block and the full `@code` method (button + dialog open logic). |
| **3. NEW/wrong** | From `HEAD`: same regions from `PermitForms.razor` (and any dialog type change in `PermitFormsViewModel.cs` if present). |
| **4. Restore** | Revert only Admin UI under `PermitForms/` (and sibling FormTemplate page if it’s the reference): wire **جدید** back to the same pattern as a working list page (`AppDialog<FormSelectionEditDialog>` + `ShowEditFormDialogAsync` or whatever the good sibling uses). Avoid touching API/Application unless the regression commit did. |

### Unblock options (for you / parent agent)

1. Fix or temporarily disable the failing **customer-api-release-policy** hook so Shell runs in agent mode.  
2. Re-dispatch this task from the **parent agent** with Read + MCP enabled, or run the four `rtk git` lines locally and paste output for analysis.

I cannot honestly list commit SHAs, OLD/NEW snippets, or an exact restore diff without that output. After you have log/patch/blame (or hook fixed), the same four-item report can be completed in one pass.

[REDACTED]
